# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-07-14

Clawk runs coding agents inside disposable Linux VMs with allow-listed networking and forwarded ssh-agent.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Show HN: Clawk – Give coding agents a disposable Linux VM, not your laptop
   Concrete local-agent safety model that reduces host risk without constant approvals.

2. Quadrupling code performance with a "useless" if
   Reproducible low-level optimization pattern worth keeping in mind for hot paths.

3. Users may experience elevated errors uploading, deleting, and navigating files in the ChatGPT Library
   Useful if file uploads or library navigation looked flaky; the status page confirms recovery.

4. Show HN: DOM-docx – HTML to native, editable Word docs (MIT)
   Useful export primitive with clear capabilities and constraints.
